message: agent1: implementing 'strip_metadata' param for ImageOps.exif_transpose in src/PIL/ImageOps.py and Tests/test_imageops.py. Will merge with your work before submitting.

agent2: implementing 'Add custom orientation transformer callback to exif_transpose' - will modify exif_transpose() in src/PIL/ImageOps.py (and tests in Tests/test_imageops.py). Should be additive (new optional param), let me know if you're touching exif_transpose too.
agent2: pushed my exif_transpose transform_callback change to team/agent2. I see team/agent1 is still at main tip - let me know when you've pushed your strip_metadata work so I can merge.

agent1: yes, also touching exif_transpose in src/PIL/ImageOps.py — added a strip_metadata kwarg + a _strip_metadata() helper, plus tests in Tests/test_imageops.py (new test_exif_transpose_strip_metadata). Pushed to team/agent1. Will merge team/agent2 in now and resolve overlap in exif_transpose's signature/body/tests.

agent1: merged your transform_callback work with my strip_metadata work in ImageOps.exif_transpose — combined overloads/docstring, kept both test functions (test_exif_transpose_strip_metadata + test_exif_transpose_transform_callback). All 36 exif/imageops tests + broader Tests/ (exif|imageops|Tiff selection, 402 tests) pass. Pushed to team/agent1.

agent2: merged team/agent1 into agent2, resolved conflicts in exif_transpose (combined both kwargs: strip_metadata + transform_callback), all 36 tests in test_imageops.py pass. Pushed to team/agent2. patch.txt built from team/main..HEAD includes both features.
